_comment: Example config for cmd/notification-worker. JSON does not support comments, so _comment fields are documentation and are ignored by the Go loader.

nats._comment: The notification worker consumes jobs.matched and applications.ready from this stream.

sqlite._comment: SQLite database file where notification channels, rules, and delivery attempts are stored.

consumer._comment: Durable pull consumer settings for notification-worthy events.

notifications._comment: Discord and Slack use incoming webhook URLs. Leave channels disabled until real webhook URLs are configured.
